Index.title: Property Selection
Index.description: We don't show you what we have, we find what you are looking for. Where architectural design meets the perfect location.
Index.leaderDesc: We have more than 116 active properties, offering the widest variety in the market of Gandia Beach and the Grau.
Index.specialistsDesc: Our location in the heart of the Grau i Platja allows us to know every corner and opportunity before anyone else.
Index.speedDesc: We average sales closings in just 15-30 days thanks to our database of qualified buyers.
Index.valuationDesc: We deliver professional and free valuation reports in less than a day so you don't waste time.
Index.dataNote: * Data based on the record of 50 closed sales in 2025.
Index.moreThanAg: More than a real estate agency
Index.story: At Vidahome, we understand that a house is not just brick and cement, but the stage where your life takes place. Our team in the Grau of Gandia is dedicated to transforming the buying and selling into a transparent, professional, and stress-free experience.
Index.apiMember: Real Estate Agents — APIVA associates nº0236

Cookie.description: We use cookies to ensure the correct functioning of our website, analyze traffic and personalize your real estate experience. You can accept all cookies or decline the non-essential ones.

About.heroDesc: At Vidahome, we don't sell square metres. We manage people's peace of mind through trust and commitment.
About.ecoP1: We know that buying or selling a property is just the beginning of a series of needs: renovations, legal procedures, technical arrangements...
About.ecoP2: At Vidahome, we don't just "pass on a contact". We've built a team of external professionals — solicitors, surveyors, architects — selected on one unwavering criterion: our own experience working with them.
About.ecoQuote: Our role is to connect good people with good professionals, removing every friction and worry for the client.
About.card1Desc: Solicitors who don't just review paperwork — they protect your interests.
About.card2Desc: Surveyors who deliver solutions, not red tape.
About.card3Desc: Renovation professionals who keep to deadlines and budgets.
About.card4Desc: Never more than a coffee away to answer any question.
About.valuesDesc: We don't measure success by the number of signatures at the notary, but by how often our clients come back to us. For us, a completed sale is the start of a lifelong relationship.
About.commitDesc: We are a company that believes in keeping its word. In a sector that can feel impersonal, we put ethics and transparency above the immediate commission.
About.postSaleDesc: Ask any of our clients what happens six months after the purchase. We're still there for whatever you need — from switching utilities to finding the best tradesperson for a small improvement.
About.beyondDesc: A service designed so your only concern is enjoying the change.
About.service1Desc: Direct connections to trusted professionals we have personally put to the test.
About.service2Desc: Our support doesn't end at the notary; we handle any paperwork or queries that follow.
About.service3Desc: Results-driven management we've verified first-hand in our own properties.
About.service4Desc: An ecosystem that gives the client total security and the serious professional peace of mind.
About.ctaTitle: Want to really get to know us? The coffee is on us.
About.ctaDesc: If you're looking for honest property management in Gandía or the surrounding area, let's talk. No pressure — just sharing a vision.
